## Platform(s)

- [ ] macOS (`Mac/`, Swift)
- [ ] Windows (`Windows/`, C#)
- [ ] Docs / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] I built and ran the affected platform locally
- [ ] Tests pass (`xcodebuild test` on macOS / `dotnet test` on Windows)
- [ ] I added/updated tests where it made sense
- [ ] Code matches the style of the surrounding files
- [ ] **Privacy upheld** — no new network calls, nothing typed is stored/logged, secure/password fields are still never read
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or build output committed
- [ ] If this changes shared behavior, the other platform is handled or noted below
